spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Strict grid hierarchy, dense and compact spacing for data visibility. Every pixel utilized.
spacing_and_layout.container: w-full max-w-[1600px] mx-auto p-4 sm:p-6 lg:p-8
spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: The 'Control Room' grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Use h-full to prevent jagged bottoms.
spacing_and_layout.radius: rounded-sm (2px) or rounded-none to maintain brutalist, sharp precision.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Expose the skeleton. Heavy use of 1px border-slate-300 on containers, grid items, and tables to create defined boundaries.

tables.structure: HTML/Tailwind or Shadcn Table. border-collapse. Full width.
tables.header: bg-slate-100 border-b border-slate-300 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-600
tables.alternating_rows: Use zebra stripes (even:bg-slate-50/50) for scanability in dense datasets.

cards.usage: Use for Summary Metrics (Totals, Pending, Paid).
cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-300 p-6 rounded-sm shadow-sm

forms.inputs: Shadcn input. border-slate-300 bg-white rounded-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7] focus:border-[#002FA7]
forms.buttons: bg-[#002FA7] hover:bg-[#002277] text-white font-medium px-6 py-2 rounded-sm shadow-sm transition-transform active:scale-95 flex items-center justify-center gap-2

navigation.pwa_mobile: Fixed bottom navigation bar for mobile (PWA). bg-white border-t border-slate-300 flex justify-around p-3 pb-safe z-50
navigation.desktop: Sidebar or top fixed nav with clear distinction from content body. border-r border-slate-300

badges.pending: bg-red-100 text-red-700 border border-red-200 px-2 py-1 rounded-sm text-xs font-semibold
badges.paid: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-200 px-2 py-1 rounded-sm text-xs font-semibold
badges.default: bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 px-2 py-1 rounded-sm text-xs font-semibold

interactions.hover_states: Buttons darken slightly. Links gain an underline or change to primary color. Table rows highlight with light slate.
interactions.focus: High contrast focus rings. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7] focus:ring-offset-2
interactions.animations: Keep animations minimal and snappy. Only micro-interactions (e.g. active tab line sliding).

icons.style: Duotone or bold depending on the active state. Clean, geometric to match the brutalist grid.

login_background.description: Grayscale photo of logistics container. Use for login page background overlay.

abstract_shape.usage: Subtle background texture for summary cards (opacity-5)

media_and_images.rules: Never use placeholder images. If no image is needed, use a solid color background with a subtle grid pattern.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Must meet minimum 4.5:1 ratio for standard text. Use text shadow over images.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, export buttons, rows) MUST include a kebab-case data-testid attribute.
accessibility_and_testing.table_scrolling: Tables must have horizontal scroll on smaller screens with sticky first column if possible.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Control Room' grid for the dashboard view. Avoid using standard rounded Shadcn cards; override to rounded-sm or rounded-none.
Use Phosphor icons for navigation and actions.
For tabular financial data (Total, Saldo a Favor, Costo), ALWAYS use tabular-nums utility class with a monospace font like IBM Plex Mono.
Ensure the application behaves as a PWA (manifest, service worker for offline). Add a bottom nav bar for mobile views.

Create 4 distinct tabs/sections: Archivo Principal (with pending/paid totals), Transporte (Filtered by Date/Transportista/Costo), Cliente (Filtered with Total Pending), Gestión de Datos (Add/Edit Form).
Integrate file upload for Excel parsing and export functionalities for Excel/PDF. Ensure upload zone matches the sharp, corporate aesthetics with a dashed border and clear instructions.
